A First Look

Step inside before you visit

About the Home

Refinished, remodeled & ready

Gorgeous 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath Colonial featuring newly refinished hardwoods, a completely remodeled kitchen and bathrooms, and a convenient half-bath downstairs. The open floor plan connects the kitchen and family room, while a spacious basement offers room to expand.

  • Newly refinished hardwood floors throughout
  • Fully remodeled kitchen and bathrooms
  • Open kitchen-to-family-room floor plan
  • Fenced yard with stamped concrete patio & gazebo
  • Custom 12x24 shed with concrete floor & power
  • Insulated, sheetrocked garage with propane heater
  • Quiet dead-end street with cul-de-sac

Updated in the last 5 years

  • Furnace & A/C for the first floor
  • Dual heat & A/C mini-splits upstairs
  • Two new electrical panels
  • New Trex deck
  • Stamped concrete patio & gazebo
  • New siding and windows
  • Custom shed with power
